fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 54. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 53.

logistics.lodging_strategy: Hotels and hostels abundant in Gdynia, Gdansk, and Sopot; book early for summer event.

final_verdict.one_liner: Premier Baltic coast gran fondo for amateur cyclists seeking scenic, low-stress endurance riding.

videos.title: Gran Fondo Gdynia - Medio 15 05 2022
videos.description: Zapraszam do obejrzenia przejazdu. Pogoda dopisała, mimo chłodnego poranka i bardzo mocnego wiatru.
videos.curation_reason: Full race ride-along experience with good view count showing actual race conditions including weather challenges.

videos.title: Gran Fondo Gdynia 2025 | Captured by HOVERAir
videos.description:
Experience the best moments from our recent adventure at the Gran Fondo in Gdynia, Poland! 🇵🇱 We love getting out there and showing how HOVERAir takes every ride to new height 🚴‍♂️✨

We had an amazing time in Gdynia and can’t wait to see you at the next event — maybe in your city 🌍

We’re proud to bring innovative aerial technology to the world of cycling. Whether it’s documenting your race, training session, or your favourite ride with friends, our cameras make it easy to relive every detail from above. 

Make sure to subscribe to our channel for more behind-the-scenes footage, event recaps, and creative ways to film your cycling adventures with HOVERAir 🎥

#HOVERAir #HOVERAirX1 #HOVERAirX1PRO #HOVERAirX1PROMAX #roadcycling
